info.title: Dumbbell API
info.description: REST API for the Dumbbell fitness tracking application

tags.name: Workout Template
tags.description: Create and manage personal workout templates

tags.name: Workout Session Sets
tags.description: Log and retrieve sets within a workout session

tags.name: User
tags.description: User registration, authentication, and profile management

tags.name: Workout Session
tags.description: Start, track and finish workout sessions

get.description: Returns a single workout template by its UUID.

put.description: Updates the name and description of an existing workout template.

delete.description: Deletes a workout template owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

put.description: Updates the username, description, and/or profile picture of the currently authenticated user.

get.description: Returns all workout templates owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new workout template for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns all workout sessions for the authenticated user, newest first.

post.description: Starts a new workout session for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns all sets logged in a specific workout session, ordered by set index.

post.description: Logs a new set for an exercise within a workout session.
Creates a new user account. Returns the created user's username and timestamps.
Issues a new JWT token and invalidates the current one.
Invalidates the current JWT token by adding it to the denylist.
Authenticates the user and returns a JWT bearer token.

patch.description: Marks a workout session as finished by setting the end time.

get.description: Returns a single workout session by its UUID.

delete.description: Deletes a workout session owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns a list of all available exercises.
Returns the details of a single exercise by its UUID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: UUID of the exercise to retrieve

delete.description: Deletes a specific logged set by its UUID.

parameters.name: setId
parameters.description: UUID of the set to delete

403.description: Set belongs to another user's session

UpdateWorkoutTemplateRequest.description: Request to update an existing workout template

name.description: New name of the workout template

UpdateMeRequest.description: Request body for updating the current user's profile

profilePictureUrl.description: URL of the user's profile picture

profilePicture.description: URL of the user's profile picture

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last profile update (epoch milliseconds)

CreateWorkoutTemplateRequest.description: Request to create a new workout template

StartWorkoutSessionRequest.description: Request to start a new workout session

workoutTemplateId.description: Optional UUID of a workout template to base this session on
Optional UUID of the source template

endedAt.description: End time (epoch ms), null if still in progress

LogSetRequest.description: Request to log a set within a workout session

setIndex.description: Index of this set within the exercise (0-based)

restSeconds.description: Rest time in seconds after this set

durationSeconds.description: Duration of the set in seconds (for timed exercises)

UserRegisterRequest.description: Request body for registering a new user account

password.description: Password (min 8 chars, must include uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character)

UserRegisterResponse.description: Response returned after successfully registering a new user

UserSessionRefreshRequest.description: Request body for refreshing a JWT session token

username.description: Username of the authenticated user requesting a new token

UserLoginResponse.description: Response returned after a successful login or token refresh

token.description: JWT bearer token to use in the Authorization header

FinishWorkoutSessionRequest.description: Request to finish an ongoing workout session

bearerAuth.description: Provide a JWT token obtained from POST /user/login with header X-API-Version: 1
